blocks.text: Prepared by Ashcombe Advisory Partners for the leadership of Castaneda, Adams and Davis. An early briefing on the program that commenced {{fact:f:E-2018-001.start}} for {{fact:f:E-2018-001.client}}.

items: The core messaging framework is drafted and in internal review.
The proof points behind each message are being confirmed one by one.
The investor calendar for the quarters ahead is mapped in draft.
We are in the early phase: settling the story before it travels.
The aim this quarter is a story that holds under a hard question.
Michael Morris, Partner -- engagement lead and your point of contact.
Laura Bradley, Senior Associate -- messaging and client-facing drafts.
Michelle Black, Communications Analyst -- supporting material and proof points.
Lauren Heath, Chief Operating Officer -- program sponsor at Castaneda, Adams and Davis.
A short set of core messages that carry the company's story.
Each claim sitting over a proof point we can stand behind.
One version of the story, told the same way to every audience.
Language tuned for investors and tested against the hard question.
What is confirmed kept cleanly apart from what is still open.
Earnings and announcement moments sequenced across the term.
Timing aligned to the company's schedule, never to ours.
A single working calendar kept current so no one is guessing.
Decisions on order made together, and made early rather than late.
Finalize the messaging framework and circulate the clean version.
Walk the framework with the {{fact:f:E-2018-001.client}} leadership for sign-off.
Prepare the material for the first investor cycle under the new frame.
